# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder_14b)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd service mesh configuration for Kubernetes. Set up linkerd.io/inject annotation for automatic proxy injection. Configure server and authorization policies for services. This is for our microservices communication security.
# Category: linkerd_no_mtls

apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: linkerd-network-policy
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      linkerd.io/inject: enabled
  policyTypes:
  - Ingress
  - Egress
  ingress:
  - from:
    - namespaceSelector:
        matchLabels:
          environment: production
    ports:
    - protocol: TCP
      port: 8080
  egress:
  - to:
    - namespaceSelector:
        matchLabels:
          environment: development
    ports:
    - protocol: TCP
      port: 9090

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: example-server-policy
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: apps
    kind: Deployment
    name: example-app
  identity:
    namespace: default
    serviceName: example-service
  tls:
    mode: STRICT

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: example-auth-policy
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: apps
    kind: Deployment
    name: example-app
  defaultAction: Allow
  from:
  - namespaceSelector:
      matchLabels:
        environment: production
  to:
  - operation:
      paths: ["/secure-endpoint"]
